steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank is the direct object of making in “making ______ lighter overall.” The two actions Stradivari performed are flattening the instrument’s curves and making [something] lighter. Since the first action targets the curves, the second must target the violin itself — “a traditional violin” is the antecedent.

steps.title: Choose the pronoun that agrees in number
steps.content:
The antecedent “a traditional violin” is singular, so the pronoun must be singular.
  • Choice A — 'those': plural pronoun; does not agree with the singular antecedent “violin.” ✗
  • Choice B — 'one': singular but ambiguous here; it leaves unclear what was made lighter. ✗
  • Choice C — 'them': plural pronoun; does not agree with the singular antecedent “violin.” ✗
  • Choice D — 'it': singular pronoun that unambiguously refers back to “a traditional violin,” satisfying pronoun-antecedent agreement. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
